articles.title: Former SNP chief executive Peter Murrell in custody after admitting £400,000 embezzlement
articles.description: The estranged husband of former Scotland first minister Nicola Sturgeon is remanded in custody after pleading guilty.

articles.title: The questions raised by the Murrell embezzlement controversy
articles.description: Thecase has been hanging over the SNP like a toxic cloud since the police investigation began five years ago.

articles.title: US military launches new strikes on targets in southern Iran, US Central Command says
articles.description: US Central Command says the strikes on Iranian missile launch sites and boats were taken in "self-defence".

articles.title: Next boss warns of 'dramatic' fall in entry-level jobs
articles.description: Lord Wolfson tells the BBC Next now typically receives double the number of applicants for one role than it did two years ago.
